やあ、司令官君。奇遇だな。<br>私はこの綺麗な噴水を眺めていたところだ。:
Well now, Commander-kun. What a coincidence.
I was just admiring this beautiful fountain.
こうして静かに流れる水を見ていると、森で暮らしていた遥か昔を思い出すよ。<br>:
Watching water flow like this reminds me of the forest, long ago.
I love the lively base too, but calm like this isn't bad either.
ああ。私はもう少しここでゆっくりしているつもりだよ。<br>うん、また……――:
Yes. I intend to stay here a little longer.
Mm, again...
やあ、司令官君。また会ったな。<br>うん？ ああ、私はあれからずっとここにいた:
Well, Commander-kun. We meet again.
Hm? Ah, I've been here the whole time since then...
え、あれからもう１日！？ ふぐぅ！ また大好きな人間と暮らす時間を無駄に<br>:
Wh-an entire day has passed!? Blurgh! I wasted precious time I
could have spent with the humans I love! When will I ever fix this~~!
